tasks.label: Agent Team Check
tasks.command: if [[ -z "$AGENTTEAMS_REPO" ]]; then echo 'Set AGENTTEAMS_REPO to your local agentteams repository path'; exit 1; fi; python3 "$AGENTTEAMS_REPO/build_team.py" --description "${workspaceFolder}/.github/agents/_build-description.json" --project "${workspaceFolder}" --framework copilot-vscode --output "${workspaceFolder}/.github/agents" --check
